overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a hooded character in white robes ascending through a gothic cathedral interior. The character climbs from wooden corridors up through stone stairwells, passes through a grand hall with a spiral staircase and fountain, and reaches an open-air observatory tower with a large mechanical astrolabe overlooking distant spires.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden corridor transitioning to stone stairwell

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow wooden corridors and beginning to ascend stone stairs

entered.detail: dark wooden panel walls with vertical planks lining the corridor
steep wooden staircase with worn steps
portrait painting in dark frame mounted on wooden wall
grey stone block walls with heavy mortar lines

segments.scene_description: The character moves through narrow enclosed corridors with dark wooden walls and paneling, ascending a wooden staircase. The environment transitions from wooden interior walls to stone block construction as the character climbs upward through the cathedral structure.

events.description: transitioning from wooden corridors to fully stone-walled stairwell

agents.ego_description: climbing the steep stone staircase, passing a descending figure in dark robes

notable_agents.action: descending the stairs toward the camera, wearing dark formal robes

entered.detail: rough-hewn grey stone blocks forming tight stairwell walls
tall thin windows letting in vertical shafts of light

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow stone stairwell with rough-hewn walls and tall narrow windows casting vertical light shafts. A figure in dark robes descends past the character heading downward. The environment is entirely stone construction with a steep continuous staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with spiral staircase and central fountain

events.description: exiting narrow stairwell into large open grand hall with high ceilings

agents.ego_description: entering the grand hall and approaching the base of a large spiral staircase

entered.detail: large circular chamber with high vaulted ceilings and stone columns
wide sweeping spiral staircase with stone steps and wooden railings
dark circular pool with blue rim at the base of the staircase
tall pale stone statues standing against the far wall

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow stairwell into a spacious grand hall with a high vaulted ceiling. A wide spiral staircase dominates the right side of the space, wrapping around a circular fountain at its base. White stone statues stand against the far walls in the dimly lit chamber.

scene_state.functional_zone: tower spiral staircase with tall windows

events.description: increasing natural light from tall windows as ascending higher in the tower

agents.ego_description: climbing the spiral staircase upward through the tower, circling around the central void

entered.detail: tall gothic windows with pointed arches letting in bright daylight
carved wooden balustrade following the curve of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the sweeping spiral staircase within the stone tower, circling upward as natural light streams through tall lancet windows. The wooden railing curves along the outer wall while the inner wall reveals the tower's stone masonry construction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air observatory platform with astronomical instruments

events.description: exiting enclosed tower onto open observatory platform with panoramic views

agents.ego_description: walking around the observatory platform, approaching the large mechanical device and looking out at the view

notable_agents.action: standing at the railing looking out at the distant view

entered.detail: open wooden deck with stone tile patterns overlooking the landscape
large intricate bronze and iron astronomical device with rotating rings
tall pointed gothic spires of the cathedral visible against the sky
wooden tripod stands with optical instruments positioned around the platform

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an open-air observatory platform with full sky visibility and panoramic views of distant snowy mountains and cathedral spires. A large mechanical astrolabe device dominates the center of the platform, with telescope tripods positioned around the perimeter. Other figures stand at the railings observing the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from the claustrophobic wooden depths of a cathedral into a vast, open-air celestial observatory. It begins within narrow corridors of dark wooden paneling, moving upward as the architecture seamlessly transitions from timber to rough-hewn stone blocks. As the camera climbs a steep stone stairwell illuminated by vertical shafts of light, it passes a descending figure before emerging into a spacious grand hall featuring a vaulted ceiling and a circular fountain. The scene then shifts as the character ascends a sweeping spiral staircase, circling upward through streaming natural light and stone masonry. Finally, the movement breaks through the interior walls onto an open-air platform, revealing a massive mechanical astrolabe and a panoramic vista of distant snowy mountains and cathedral spires.
